overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The character crosses an intersection, passes a construction site with workers, walks along a canal, and stops on a bridge to view the downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with traffic signals

events.description: character begins walking across the intersection toward the construction site

agents.ego_description: walking across the street intersection toward the sidewalk on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians standing on the sidewalk corner

entered.detail: red traffic light suspended over the intersection
tall modern skyscrapers visible in the distance
tall palm tree lining the street
building under construction with exposed framework

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a sunny urban intersection with traffic lights and palm trees. The character crosses the asphalt road toward a construction site, with the downtown skyline visible in the background and sparse vehicle traffic passing through.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to active construction site

events.description: approaching two construction workers conversing near a dumpster
passing the workers and continuing along the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the construction site

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange safety vest holding a drink
construction worker in blue hard hat talking to his colleague

entered.detail: metal scaffolding surrounding the building under construction
large blue industrial dumpster with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside an active construction site with scaffolding and dumpsters. Two construction workers are seen conversing near a yellow dumpster before the character passes them and continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian path along urban canal

events.description: path opens to reveal the urban canal waterway with downtown views ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the canal path with water on the left and construction on the right

entered.detail: calm water in the concrete-lined urban canal
well-trimmed green hedges lining the canal edge
white concrete arch bridge crossing the canal ahead

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a waterfront walkway with a calm urban canal on the left and the construction site continuing on the right. Trimmed hedges line the water's edge as the character approaches a concrete bridge with the downtown skyline becoming more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian bridge with panoramic downtown views

events.description: ascending onto the concrete bridge over the canal
character stops on the bridge to look at the downtown skyline and canal view

agents.ego_description: crossing the bridge then stopping to look at the scenic view of the canal and downtown skyline

notable_agents.action: man in black shirt and pants walking across the bridge in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white concrete railing along the bridge edge
modern yellow house with wooden accents along the canal
tree with pink blossoms on the canal bank

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto a concrete bridge crossing the canal, where the view opens to reveal the full downtown skyline reflected in the water. After crossing paths with a pedestrian, the character stops to observe the scenic waterfront houses and distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban neighborhood that gradually opens into a panoramic waterfront view of the city skyline. It begins at a bright intersection with palm trees and traffic lights, moving across the asphalt road toward a nearby construction site. As the camera follows the character along a concrete sidewalk, the scene passes by scaffolding and workers conversing near a yellow dumpster before transitioning onto a waterfront walkway. The path then shifts to follow a calm urban canal lined with trimmed hedges, with the downtown skyscrapers becoming increasingly prominent in the distance. Finally, the camera ascends onto a concrete bridge where the view expands to reveal the full skyline reflected in the water and a row of scenic waterfront houses.
